name: Eggplant Parmesan
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Spray two cookie sheets and a 9x13 pan with cooking spray.
3. Peel and cut the eggplant into 1/4 inch circles.
4. Place the eggplant in a shallow bowl filled with milk.
5. In another bowl, combine bread crumbs with basil, oregano, and thyme.
6. Dip each piece of eggplant first into the milk, then into the bread crumb mixture.
7. Place the coated eggplant pieces on the prepared cookie sheets.
8. Bake for 20-30 minutes or until tender.
9. Remove from the oven.
10. In a 9x13 pan, ladle some pizza sauce and spread it evenly.
11. Add layers of eggplant, followed by more sauce and mozzarella cheese.
12. Repeat layering until all ingredients are used or space is filled.
13. Sprinkle parmesan cheese on top.
14. Bake uncovered for about 40 minutes, or until heated through and bubbly around the edges.
Serving size: 1 serving
Calories per serving: 255 cal
Fat per serving: 6 g (20.3% cff)
